name: Memory Crush King
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>記憶破壊王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>メモリー・クラッシュ・キング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent by a direct attack, remove from play all Synchro Monsters in your opponent's Graveyard, and inflict 1000 damage to your opponent for each monster removed.
mnst_eff: When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent by a direct attack, remove from play all Synchro Monsters in your opponent's Graveyard, and inflict 1000 damage to your opponent for each monster removed.
eff: When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent by a direct attack, remove from play all Synchro Monsters in your opponent's Graveyard, and inflict 1000 damage to your opponent for each monster removed.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
